title: Method and device for processing flour
abstract: Embodiments of the present disclosure relate to a method and a device for processing flour. The method comprises: adding water to the flour to increase the moisture rate of the flour; generating superheated steam; and subjecting the moistened flour to the superheated steam for a predetermined period of time. With the inventive method, superheated steam is used for processing the flour, and the flour can be treated in an easy way and in much less time.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A method (200) for processing flour, comprising: adding (220) water to the flour to increase a moisture rate of the flour; generating (240) superheated steam; and maintaining (260) the moistened flour in the superheated steam for a predetermined period of time. 2. The method according to claim 1, wherein the added water is in gaseous form. 3. The method according to claim 2, wherein the temperature of the added water is lower than the gelatinization temperature of the flour, and a difference between the temperature of the added water and the gelatinization temperature of the flour is below a threshold value. 4. The method according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the moisture rate of the flour after adding water is in the range of 15-35%, such as in the range of 25-30%. 5. The method according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the temperature of the superheated steam is within a range of 120 Â° C~170 Â° C, such as in the range of 130 Â° C~160 Â° C, and more particularly about 140 Â° C . 6. The method according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the length of the period of time is within a range of 5~20 minutes. 7. A device (100, 300) for processing flour, comprising: a container (110, 310) for holding the flour, a cover (120) for the container, and a superheated steam generator (130, 330) coupled with the container for generating superheated steam, wherein the superheated steam generator (130, 330) is configured to provide the 

 container (110, 310) with the superheated steam for a predetermined period of time when the device is in operation. 8. The device according to claim 7, further comprising a water-adding device (140, 340) coupled with the container (110, 310) to provide water to the container (110, 310) so as to moisten the flour. 9. The device according to claim 8, wherein the water-adding device (140, 340) comprises a water nozzle, which is configured to spray water toward the flour, or an evaporator which is configured to provide water in gaseous form to the container. 10. The device according to claim 8 or 9, further comprising a temperature-control device configured to control the temperature of the water added to the container to be below the gelatinization temperature of the flour. 11. The device according to any of claims 7-10, further comprising a weighing meter configured to control the amount of water provided to the container and/or a timer to control the time duration of the water-adding step. 12. The device according to any of claims 7-11, wherein the container (110, 310) comprises a stirrer (150) configured to stir the flour. 13. The device according to any of claims 7-12, wherein the superheated steam generator (130, 330) comprises a heater attached to or near the container and configured to heat water in gaseous form. 14. The device according to any of claims 7-13, further comprising a temperature sensor to sense the temperature of the superheated steam and a controller to keep the temperature of the superheated steam to be within a range of 120 Â° C~170 Â° C, such as in the range of 130 Â° C~160 Â° C, and more particularly about 140 Â° C, based on a signal from the temperature sensor. 15. A flour processing apparatus, comprising a device (100, 300) for processing flour according to any of claims 7 to 14, and at least one processor configured to perform the method according to any of claims 1 to 6.
